change: Content-free reliability assertions and native memory-pressure/session telemetry
reliabilityChanges: Diagnostic exports assert exact sorted segment manifests and durable non-sparse transcription checkpoint prefixes/bounds.
Diagnostic exports assert retained audio metadata for resumable states, completed transcript/summary outcomes, and nonterminal states without exporting titles or meeting content.

Native session start/status/interruption/segment/memory-pressure/auto-stop/stop events include active state, exact segment/failure counts, committed bytes, recorded duration, and free space where available.
iOS UIApplication memory warnings and Android onTrimMemory levels reach the recorder adapter without stopping healthy capture.
Every native/browser free-space check records measured, unknown, or failed terminal diagnostic evidence.

focusedCoverage: silent checkpoint acceptance without accepting sparse holes

ios.knownHostGate: Xcode 26.3 cannot mount the developer disk image for the paired iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build, pure-state assertions, and adapter injection do not prove memory-pressure delivery during physical mobile suspension, locked 60/120-minute capture, real saved-audio transcription, interruption recovery, or destination-app receipt.
